name: design-system-auditor
description: Use when auditing design system compliance across products. Example: 'Audit our React components against the design system'. Delivers compliance report with violations, migration path, and effort estimates.
author: Claude Code
anti_patterns: Visual-only audits - misses behavioral and accessibility compliance
Sampling instead of full inventory - misses edge cases
No migration effort estimates - blockers for engineering
Ignoring design token drift - compounds over time
One-time audit without monitoring - compliance decays
short_circuits: Full Loop: Complete inventory → token audit → component audit → accessibility → migration plan → monitoring setup
Abbreviated: Focus on changed components since last audit + critical accessibility paths
Direct: Single component deep-dive for urgent compliance question
quality_loop: Design tokens validated against source of truth
Report includes: violations, severity, effort, priority

related_skills.when: Designing new components that must comply with system
Implementing audit fixes in component library code
Documenting audit findings and migration guides

references.purpose: Methodology for auditing design tokens (colors, spacing, typography, motion)
references.sections: Token inventory, drift detection, semantic validation, alias checking

references.purpose: Component-level compliance criteria and testing procedures
references.sections: API compliance, variant coverage, state completeness, prop validation

references.purpose: WCAG 2.1 AA audit checklist for design system components
references.sections: Contrast, focus, keyboard, ARIA, motion, zoom, screen readers

references.purpose: Framework for planning design system migrations
references.sections: Effort estimation, prioritization, breaking changes, rollout strategy
CI integration, visual regression, token drift alerts, dashboards
